title: Light Novel 'Majo to Youhei' Gets TV Anime in 2027
content: Production company Bandai Namco Filmworks opened an official website for a television anime adaptation of Kaeru Chouhoukiteki 's Majo to Youhei ( Witch and Mercenary ) light novel on Wednesday, revealing the main cast, staff, a teaser visual (pictured above), and teaser promo. The anime series will air on NTV in 2027.
author: MyAnimeList

title: 'Azur Lane: Bisoku Zenshin! Ni!!' Reveals Additional Cast, Theme Song, Second Promo
content: • The official website of Azur Lane: Bisoku Zenshin! Ni!! ( Azur Lane: Slow Ahead! Season 2 ) revealed additional cast, the theme song, and the second promotional video on Monday. The new season is scheduled to premiere on July 6 at 1:00 a.m. on BS11, followed by Tokyo MX.
author: MyAnimeList

title: Kaeru Chōhōkiteki's Witch and Mercenary Novels Get TV Anime in 2027
content: Bandai Namco Entertainment announced on Wednesday that Kaeru Chōhōkiteki 's Witch and Mercenary ( Majo to Yōhei ) light novel series will get a television anime adaptation that will premiere on the NTV channel in 2027.
author: ANN

title: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime Manga Ends in Volume 32 on June 9
content: Kadokawa 's Dengeki Online website announced on Tuesday that Taiki Kawakami 's manga adaptation of Fuse and Mitz Vah 's That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime ( Tensei Shitara Slime Datta Ken ) light novel series will end with its 32nd compiled book volume, which will ship on June 9.
author: ANN

title: 'Hidan no Aria' Commemorates 15th Anniversary with Short Anime
content: Production company Kadokawa announced a short anime adaptation of Chuugaku Akamatsu 's Hidan no Aria ( Aria the Scarlet Ammo ) light novel on Wednesday, revealing a key visual (pictured). The short anime is commemorating the anime series' 15th anniversary.
author: MyAnimeList

title: Aria the Scarlet Ammo Anime Gets New Short Anime for 15th Anniversary
content: Kadokawa announced on Wednesday that the Aria the Scarlet Ammo series will get a new short anime, in commemoration of the anime's 15th anniversary. More details for the short anime will be revealed at a later date.
author: ANN

title: Godzilla Minus Zero Film Presents 1st Teaser
content: TOHO presented the first teaser trailer for Godzilla Minus Zero , the new Godzilla film from Godzilla Minus One 's Takashi Yamazaki , on Wednesday. The teaser confirms that the sequel is set in 1949, two years after Godzilla Minus One .
author: ANN

title: Godzilla Minus One Sequel Debuts Awesome First Trailer (& Confirms Major Returns)
content: Godzilla Minus One is coming back with a new sequel later around the world later this year, and now Toho and GKIDS have officially dropped the first trailer showing off Godzilla Minus Zero .
author: ComicBook

title: Manga 'Black Channel' Gets TV Anime
content: A television anime adaptation of Satoshi Kisaichi 's Black Channel manga was announced by publishing company Shogakukan through the official Monthly CoroCoro Comic Twitter (now X) account on Tuesday, revealing an announcement visual (pictured).
author: MyAnimeList

title: 7 Coolest Overpowered Isekai Heroes (Ranked By Power Level)
content: Isekai is one of the biggest anime franchises out there today , and that means fans have been introduced to some of the strongest heroes as a result. Thanks to the fact that Isekai often fulfills the wishes of many of their fans, a lot of the standout anime releases have seen ordinary people being whisked away to…
author: ComicBook
